recommendations.title: Jojo Rabbit
recommendations.overview: Jojo, a lonely German boy during World War II has his world shaken when he learns that his single mother is hiding a Jewish girl in their home. Influenced by a buffoonish imaginary version of Adolf Hitler, he begins to question his beliefs and confro

recommendations.title: The Dreamseller
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned psychologist tries to commit suicide until he strikes up a friendship with an unlikely saviour who teaches him a new way of living.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Killed Hitler and Then the Bigfoot
recommendations.genres: Drama, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, War
recommendations.overview: Decades after serving in WWII and assassinating Adolf Hitler, a legendary American war veteran must now hunt down the fabled Bigfoot.

recommendations.title: Triumph of the Will
recommendations.overview: A showcase of German chancellor and Nazi Party leader Adolf Hitler at the 1934 Nuremberg Rally.

recommendations.title: The Big Fake
recommendations.overview: Toni Chichiarelli arrives in Rome with the dream of becoming a painter, but his talent leads him elsewhere — from art galleries to state secrets. Between art, crime, and power, his signature ends up everywhere — even in the history of Italy.

recommendations.title: Tolkien
recommendations.overview: England, early 20th century. The future writer and philologist John Ronald Reuel Tolkien (1892-1973) and three of his schoolmates create a strong bond between them as they share the same passion for literature and art, a true fellowship that strength

recommendations.title: The Tattoo
recommendations.overview: An art dealer wants to buy a Modigliani, which is tattooed on the back of an old soldier.

recommendations.title: Darkest Hour
recommendations.overview: In May 1940, the fate of World War II hangs on Winston Churchill, who must decide whether to negotiate with Adolf Hitler or fight on knowing that it could mean the end of the British Empire.

recommendations.title: Mario
recommendations.overview: Two young gay soccer players get caught up between the politics of the game and the politics of love.

recommendations.title: My Führer
